name: Escargots on Mushroom Caps
recipeInstructions:
1. Capture and prepare the snails: Place 18 snails in a ventilated box with cornmeal. Spray the cornmeal lightly to keep them calm for at least 72 hours.
2. Clean the snails: Remove the snails from the box, wash them thoroughly in cold water, and drop them into boiling water containing a bay leaf. Cook for 15 minutes until they are clean and easily openable. Drain and remove the meat from the shells, discarding the tail end where it attaches to the shell.
3. Season the snails: Rinse the cleaned snails again with cold running water.
4. Prepare the sauce: In a saucepan, combine white wine, chopped onion, crushed garlic (about 4 cloves), allspice, soy sauce, and vegetable seasoning. Cook over low heat for 10 minutes.
5. Combine additional ingredients: Remove the cooked snails from the pan and drain any excess liquid. Add butter, finely chopped parsley, minced green onions, and a pinch of nutmeg to the liquid. Stir well.
6. Assemble the dish: Place mushroom caps in a baking dish. Top each with one snail and pour the prepared liquid over all. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 7 minutes.
7. Serve: Remove from the oven and serve immediately with sliced French bread.
